terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Text: By accessing or using HookSniff ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.s2Text: HookSniff provides webhook delivery infrastructure for developers. The Service includes webhook delivery, retry logic, signature verification, monitoring dashboard, and related APIs.
s3Items: You must provide accurate registration information
You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials
You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service
One account per person or entity
s4Items: API keys are issued to your account and must be kept confidential
You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your API keys
Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized use of your API keys
We may rotate or revoke API keys for security reasons
s5Items: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
Send webhooks to internal, private, or malicious endpoints (SSRF)
Attempt to circumvent rate limits or security measures
Resell or redistribute the Service without authorization
Use the Service to send spam, malware, or phishing content
Interfere with or disrupt the Service or its infrastructure
s6Items: You retain ownership of all data you send through the Service
We process webhook payloads solely for delivery purposes
We do not inspect, analyze, or sell your webhook data
Payloads are stored temporarily for delivery and retry purposes, then deleted per the retention policy
s7Items: The Service is provided on a "best effort" basis
We do not guarantee 100% delivery or uptime
Paid plans include the SLA terms specified in the applicable pricing tier
We may perform scheduled maintenance with reasonable advance notice
s8Items: Webhook delivery logs are retained according to your plan's retention period
After the retention period, data is automatically and permanently deleted
s9Items: Paid plans are billed monthly in advance
All fees are non-refundable except as required by applicable law
We may change pricing with 30 days' notice
Failure to pay may result in account suspension or downgrade to Free plan
Overage charges may apply if you exceed your plan limits
s10Items: The Service, including its code, design, and documentation, is our intellectual property
You retain all rights to your data and content
You grant us a limited license to process your data solely to provide the Service
terms.s11MaxExtent: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW:
s11Items: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND
WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES
OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE 12 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM
WE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR DATA LOSS, LOST PROFITS, OR BUSINESS INTERRUPTION
terms.s12Intro: You agree to indemnify and hold us harmless from any claims, losses, or damages arising from:
s12Items: Your violation of any third-party rights
Webhook payloads you send through the Service
s13Items: You may terminate your account at any time through the dashboard
We may terminate or suspend your account for violation of these Terms
We may discontinue the Service with 30 days' notice
Upon termination, your data will be deleted within 30 days
terms.s14Text: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or dashboard notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.s15Text: These Terms are governed by the laws of Turkey. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Turkey.
terms.s16Text: For questions about these Terms, contact:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Text: HookSniff ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our webhook delivery service ("Service").
s21Items: Payment information (processed by Stripe, not stored by us)
s22Items: API request logs (endpoint URLs, timestamps, response codes)
Webhook delivery logs (payloads, delivery attempts, status)
IP addresses (for security and rate limiting)
s3Items: Send service-related notifications (delivery failures, billing alerts)
Improve the Service and fix bugs
s4Items: We process webhook payloads solely for delivery to your configured endpoints
Payloads are stored temporarily for delivery, retry, and logging purposes
Payloads are automatically deleted according to your plan's retention period
We do not inspect, analyze, mine, or sell your webhook data
We do not use your webhook data for advertising or profiling
privacy.s5Intro: We do NOT sell your personal data. We may share information with:
s5Items: Polar.sh: Payment processing (subject to Polar.sh's Privacy Policy)
iyzico: Payment processing for Turkish customers (subject to iyzico's Privacy Policy)
Infrastructure providers: Cloud hosting for Service operation
Legal authorities: When required by law, court order, or to protect our rights
Business transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
s6Items: API keys are hashed before storage (SHA-256)
Access controls and authentication for all systems
privacy.s6Disclaimer: However, no method of transmission or storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s7Note: After the retention period, data is automatically and permanently deleted.
s8Items: Access: Request a copy of your personal data
Correct: Request correction of inaccurate data
Delete: Request deletion of your personal data
Export: Request your data in a portable format
Object: Object to processing of your personal data
Withdraw consent: Where processing is based on consent
privacy.s8How: To exercise these rights, contact us via the contact form
privacy.s9Text: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. You can control cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.s10Text: Your data may be processed in countries outside your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for international transfers, including Standard Contractual Clauses where required.
privacy.s11Text: Our Service is not intended for children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.s12Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or dashboard notification.
privacy.s13Text: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us via the contact form

features.dlqDesc: Failed deliveries are preserved for debugging. Nothing gets lost.
features.globalDesc: Deploy worldwide for low-latency webhook delivery to any endpoint.

faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about HookSniff
a1: HookSniff is a webhook delivery service for developers. We reliably deliver webhooks to your endpoints with automatic retries, HMAC signatures, and real-time monitoring. Think of it as a postal service for your HTTP callbacks.
q2: How is HookSniff different from Svix or Hookdeck?
a2: HookSniff offers similar features at 10x lower cost. Our Pro plan is $29/mo vs Svix at $490/mo. We also support 11 SDKs, FIFO delivery, CloudEvents, and a schema registry — features that competitors charge extra for or don't offer.
a3: Yes. HookSniff handles thousands of webhook deliveries daily with 99.9% uptime. We use PostgreSQL for durable storage, automatic retries with exponential backoff, and dead letter queues for failed deliveries.
a4: Sign up for a free account at hooksniff.vercel.app, get your API key, and create an endpoint. Send your first webhook in under 5 minutes with our quick start guide or SDK.
q5: Do I need a credit card to start?
a5: No. The free plan includes 10,000 webhook deliveries per month with no credit card required. Upgrade to Pro or Business when you need more.
q6: What payment methods do you accept?
a6: We accept all major credit cards via Stripe, and support Polar.sh for global payments and iyzico for Turkish customers. All plans are billed monthly.
q7: Can I change my plan at any time?
a7: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade anytime from your dashboard. Upgrades take effect immediately with prorated billing. Downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period.
q8: What happens if I exceed my plan limits?
a8: We won't cut you off. If you exceed your webhook limit, additional deliveries are queued and processed when your limit resets. We'll notify you so you can upgrade if needed.
a9: Failed deliveries are retried with exponential backoff: 30s, 60s, 120s, 5min, 10min, 30min. After max attempts (default 5), the delivery moves to a dead letter queue for debugging.
a10: Every webhook delivery includes an X-HookSniff-Signature header containing an HMAC-SHA256 hash of the payload. Verify this signature on your end to ensure the webhook came from HookSniff and wasn't tampered with.
a11: Yes. In addition to HTTP POST delivery, HookSniff supports WebSocket connections for real-time event streaming. Configure WebSocket delivery per endpoint.
q12: What is the dead letter queue?
a12: The dead letter queue stores failed deliveries that exhausted all retry attempts. You can inspect payloads, error messages, and response codes to debug issues before replaying the delivery.
a13: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. We use HMAC-SHA256 for webhook signatures, Argon2id for password hashing, and support 2FA via TOTP. We're SOC 2 ready.
a14: Yes, for the duration of your plan's retention period (7-365 days depending on plan). Payloads are stored encrypted and automatically deleted after the retention period. You can also delete them manually.
q15: Can I use a custom domain?
a15: Yes. Business plan customers can configure custom domains for their webhook endpoints. SSL certificates are automatically provisioned via Let's Encrypt.
cantFindAnswer: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.

getStarted.subtitle: Send your first webhook in under 5 minutes. HookSniff handles delivery, retries, security, and monitoring.

getStarted.step2Desc: Your API key authenticates requests. You can find it in your dashboard after signing up.

getStarted.step3Desc: Choose your language and install the SDK. HookSniff has official SDKs for 11 languages.
getStarted.step4Desc: An endpoint is a URL where HookSniff delivers your webhooks. You can create one via the SDK, API, or dashboard.
getStarted.viaDashboardDesc: Go to Endpoints → click Create Endpoint → enter your URL.
getStarted.viaApiDesc: Use the SDK code from Step 3, or send a POST request to
getStarted.tipPlayground: Tip: Use HookSniff Playground to test webhooks without a real endpoint. It gives you a temporary URL that captures all requests.
getStarted.step5Desc: Now let's send a test webhook. Use the code below or try the interactive playground.
getStarted.step6Desc: Track every webhook delivery in real-time. See success rates, debug failures, replay failed webhooks, and monitor performance.
getStarted.eventTypesDesc: Common webhook event types you can use. These are suggestions — use any event type you want.
getStarted.embedDesc: Give your customers a white-labeled webhook portal inside your own dashboard.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heroSubtitle: Save 12+ months of webhook infrastructure development. Start free, scale when ready.
pricing.heroNote: No credit card required. No surprise charges. Cancel anytime.
pricing.payWhatYouUse: Only pay for what you actually send
pricing.payWhatYouUseDesc: Retries are free. Filtered messages are free. Failed deliveries that we retry 5 times still count as 1 webhook. We absorb the cost because reliable delivery is our promise.
pricing.roiDesc: See how much you save with HookSniff vs competitors.
buildOwnItems: Retry logic is hard to get right
pricing.startupDesc: We have special startup plans to help you grow. Pre-Series A startups get extended free tiers and significant discounts on paid plans.
pricing.ctaDesc: Join thousands of developers who trust HookSniff for webhook delivery.

pricingFaq.a: A webhook is an event delivered to your endpoint. Failed deliveries that are retried do not count as additional webhooks — retries are free. Filtered messages are also free.

pricingFaq.q: Do I need a credit card to start?
pricingFaq.a: No. You can sign up and start sending webhooks on the Free plan without a credit card. Upgrade when you need more volume or features.

pricingFaq.q: What happens if I exceed my plan limit?
pricingFaq.a: We never drop webhooks. If you exceed your monthly limit, additional events are metered at the per-plan rate. You can also set a hard cap in your dashboard settings.
Yes. A webhook includes all its retries. If a delivery fails and we retry it 3 times, that still counts as 1 webhook. We absorb the retry cost because reliable delivery is our core promise.
Yes. Upgrades take effect immediately and are prorated. Downgrades take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. No penalties, no hidden fees.
Yes! If you're an early-stage startup (pre-Series A), contact us via the contact form with your details. We offer significant discounts and extended free tiers.

pricingFaq.q: What's the difference between Pro and Business?
pricingFaq.a: Pro is for growing teams that need more volume and better monitoring. Business is for teams that need SLA guarantees, FIFO delivery, SSO, and dedicated support.
Yes. Annual billing saves you 20% compared to monthly. That's $278/year for Pro and $950/year for Business.

pricingFaq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricingFaq.a: We accept all major credit cards via Stripe. For Business and Enterprise plans, we also support invoicing and bank transfers.
Yes! HookSniff is open-source. You can self-host with Docker. Self-hosted instances get community support. Paid plans add priority support for self-hosted.
We support 11 SDKs: Node.js, Python, Rust, C#, Go, Swift, PHP, Elixir, Java, Kotlin, and Ruby.
Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest. We use HMAC-SHA256 for webhook signatures, Argon2 for password hashing, and support 2FA/TOTP.
Yes. We are GDPR compliant. We process data in EU regions, support data export/deletion requests, and have a published privacy policy.
Free and Pro plans have a 99.9% uptime target (best effort). Business plans include a 99.9% uptime SLA with credits if we miss it.

pricingFaq.q: How does HookSniff compare to Svix?
pricingFaq.a: HookSniff offers similar features at 10x lower cost. Svix starts at $490/month; HookSniff Pro is $49/month. We also support more SDKs (11 vs 6), FIFO delivery, and CloudEvents.
Yes. You can export all your webhook logs, endpoint configurations, and delivery history as JSON or CSV from the dashboard.

rateLimiting.title: ⚡ Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.subtitle: Monitor and configure rate limits for your webhook endpoints.
rateLimiting.emptyDesc: HookSniff automatically rate-limits webhook deliveries to protect your endpoints. Configure limits per endpoint in settings.
rateLimiting.tokenBucketDesc: Each endpoint has a token bucket that refills at the configured rate. Requests consume tokens.
rateLimiting.burstHandlingDesc: Short bursts are allowed up to the burst size, then requests are queued.
rateLimiting.queueRetryDesc: Excess requests are queued and delivered when capacity is available. Failed deliveries retry with exponential backoff.
rateLimiting.perEndpointConfigDesc: Each endpoint can have custom rate limits. Defaults: 10 req/sec, 600 req/min, burst 20.

sso.title: 🔐 SSO / SAML
sso.subtitle: Configure Single Sign-On for your organization. Enterprise plan required.
sso.enableSsoDesc: When enabled, all team members must authenticate via SSO.
sso.upgradeHintSuffix: to enable SSO for your organization.

auditLog.noActivityDesc: Actions like login, endpoint creation, API key rotation, and team changes will appear here.

customDomain.dnsRecordsDesc: Add these records to your DNS provider (Cloudflare, Route53, etc.)
customDomain.domainAdded: Domain added! Add the DNS records below.

customDomain.step2Desc: We'll give you CNAME and TXT records to add to your DNS provider
customDomain.step3Desc: We verify ownership and automatically provision an SSL certificate

signatureVerifier.title: 🔐 Signature Verifier
signatureVerifier.subtitle: Verify webhook signatures to ensure payloads are authentic. HookSniff signs every webhook with HMAC-SHA256.
signatureVerifier.validDesc: The payload is authentic and has not been tampered with.
signatureVerifier.invalidDesc: The signature does not match. The payload may have been tampered with.
signatureVerifier.step1Desc: When a webhook is delivered, HookSniff computes an HMAC hash of the raw request body using your endpoint's secret key.
signatureVerifier.step2Desc: The signature is sent in the x-hooksniff-signature header (format: sha256=<hex_digest>).
signatureVerifier.step3Desc: Compute the same HMAC hash on your server and compare it with the received signature. Use constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks.

endpointSettings.title: Endpoint Settings
endpointSettings.rotateSecretDesc: Rotate your signing secret. The old secret remains valid for 24 hours to allow seamless migration.
endpointSettings.testWebhookDesc: Send a test webhook to this endpoint to verify it's working correctly.
endpointSettings.testFailed: ❌ Failed — check endpoint URL and try again.
endpointSettings.rotateConfirmDesc: The old secret will remain valid for 24 hours. Update your webhook consumers to use the new secret before then.
endpointSettings.toastSecretRotated: Secret rotated! Old secret valid for 24 hours.
endpointSettings.toastTestSent: Test webhook sent! Check your endpoint.
